d: slaying Hua Xiong before the wine cooled
cannot; does not know how to

p: guò wǔ guān zhǎn liù jiàng
d: pass five gates, slay six generals
a place military strategists must fight for
easy to defend, hard to attack
three kingdoms standing like a tripod
right now; in the process of
to pour out; to use up
so happy as to forget Shu
